real_questions: What impact, if any, are recent AI rollouts and high interest rates having on your ability to fundraise?

real_questions.text: Redemption requests are elevated across the industry — what are you seeing in your funds, and in non-traded structures specifically?

agency_intel.text: Alt manager earnings stayed strong through Q1 2026 despite choppy markets; private credit concerns are mostly isolated to software/tech exposures (BDCs especially) with little impact on overall results. The strain point agencies watch: elevated redemption requests, driven by AI disruption risk in software companies and broader private credit concerns. Expect probes on earnings growth, realizations, and redemption requests in non-traded BDCs specifically.
